---
title: "Hello!"
---


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}
I'm Moaaz. I am currently a Mathematics PhD candidate at the University of Oregon, expecting to graduate in 2027.
I am fortunate to be working under the supervision of [Victor Ostrik](https://pages.uoregon.edu/vostrik/).

Here is my [CV](cv.pdf){target="_blank"} - last updated: March, 2026

contact email: malqady@uoregon.edu
:::


::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](me.png)
:::
